Title: User Creation
Preconditions: System is initialized and ready for user creation.
Test Data:
- Valid: ID = "u123", nomeCognome = "John Doe", email = "john.doe@example.com"
- Invalid: ID = "", nomeCognome = "", email = ""
Test Steps:
1. Call createUtente with valid data.
2. Call createUtente with invalid data.
Expected Result:
- For valid data: Returns true and user is created.
- For invalid data: Returns false and user is not created.

Title: Password Check
Preconditions: User is created and has a password.
Test Data:
- Valid: ID = "u123", password = "password123"
- Invalid: ID = "u123", password = "wrongpassword"
Test Steps:
1. Call checkPassword with valid credentials.
2. Call checkPassword with invalid credentials.
Expected Result:
- For valid credentials: Returns true.
- For invalid credentials: Returns false.

Title: Password Reset
Preconditions: User exists and has a current password.
Test Data:
- Valid: ID = "u123", oldPassword = "password123", newPassword = "newpassword123"
- Invalid: ID = "u123", oldPassword = "wrongpassword", newPassword = "newpassword123"
Test Steps:
1. Call resetPassword with valid old and new passwords.
2. Call resetPassword with invalid old password and valid new password.
Expected Result:
- For valid data: Returns true and password is updated.
- For invalid data: Returns false and password is not updated.

Title: Get All Users
Preconditions: At least one user exists in the system.
Test Steps: 1. Call getUtenti.
Expected Result: - Returns a list containing all user IDs.

Title: Device Information Retrieval
Preconditions: At least one device exists in the system.
Test Steps: 1. Call getDeviceInfo.
Expected Result: - Returns a list containing device information.

Title: Get Configuration Settings
Preconditions: Configuration settings exist in the system.
Test Steps: 1. Call getconfig.
Expected Result: - Returns a list containing all configuration settings.

Title: Set Water Configuration
Preconditions: Configuration settings exist in the system.
Test Data:
- Valid: True
- Invalid: False (assuming invalid means an unexpected value)
Test Steps:
1. Call setWater with valid data.
2. Call setWater with invalid data.
Expected Result:
- For valid data: Returns true and water setting is updated.
- For invalid data: Returns false and water setting is not updated.

Title: Set Temperature Configuration
Preconditions: Configuration settings exist in the system.
Test Steps:
1. Call setTemp with valid data.
2. Call setTemp with invalid data.
Expected Result:
- For valid data: Returns true and temperature setting is updated.
- For invalid data: Returns false and temperature setting is not updated.

Title: Get Alert Message
Preconditions: An alert message exists in the system.
Test Steps: 1. Call getMessage.
Expected Result: - Returns the current alert message.

Title: Update Alert Message
Preconditions: An alert message exists in the system.
Test Steps:
1. Call updateMessage with valid data.
2. Call updateMessage with invalid data.
Expected Result:
- For valid data: Returns true and alert message is updated.
- For invalid data: Returns false and alert message is not updated.

Title: Get Historical Data
Preconditions: Historical data exists in the system.
Test Steps: 1. Call getHistory.
Expected Result: - Returns a list containing historical data.

Title: Update Historical Data
Preconditions: Historical data exists in the system.
Test Data:
- Valid: data = "2023-10-01", soil_humidity = 30.0, temperature = 25.0, luminosity = 500.0
- Invalid: data = "", soil_humidity = -100.0, temperature = 1000.0, luminosity = -500.0
Test Steps:
1. Call updateHistory with valid data.
2. Call updateHistory with invalid data.
Expected Result:
- For valid data: Returns true and historical data is updated.
- For invalid data: Returns false and historical data is not updated.

Title: Display Default Message
Preconditions: User has accessed the system.
Test Steps:
1. Execute Accesso eseguito.
2. Execute Visualizzazione messaggio default.
Expected Result: - Displays a default message.

Title: Display Greenhouse List
Preconditions: User has accessed the system and at least one greenhouse is associated.
Test Steps:
1. Execute Accesso eseguito.
2. Execute Visualizzazione messaggio default.
3. Execute almeno 1 serra associata (returns "Si").
4. Execute Click "Serre".
5. Execute Visualizzazione elenco serre.
6. Loop back to Accesso eseguito.
Expected Result: - Displays the list of greenhouses and loops back to the start.

Title: No Associated Greenhouses
Preconditions: User has accessed the system and no greenhouses are associated.
Test Steps:
1. Execute Accesso eseguito.
2. Execute Visualizzazione messaggio default.
3. Execute almeno 1 serra associata (returns "No").
4. Execute Click "Serre".
5. Loop back to Accesso eseguito.
Expected Result: - Displays a message indicating no greenhouses are associated and loops back to the start.

Title: Add Device with Valid Input
Preconditions: User has accessed the system.
Test Data: - Valid: Device ID = "d123", Device Title = "Greenhouse Sensor"
Test Steps:
1. Execute Accesso eseguito.
2. Execute Click "Add Devices".
3. Execute campo inserito correttamente (returns "Si").
4. Execute Operazione eseguita.
Expected Result: - Device is added successfully.

Title: Add Device with Invalid Input
Preconditions: User has accessed the system.
Test Steps:
1. Execute Accesso eseguito.
2. Execute Click "Add Devices".
3. Execute campo inserito correttamente (returns "No").
4. Execute valore errato.
5. Loop back to Click "Add Devices".
Expected Result: - Device is not added and user is prompted to re-enter data.

Title: Configure Device with Valid Input
Preconditions: User has accessed the system and connected to a greenhouse.
Test Data: - Valid: Water = True, Max Temp = 30.0, Min Temp = 10.0, Max Soil Hum = 50.0, Min Soil Hum = 10.0, Max Lum = 1000.0, Min Lum = 100.0
Test Steps:
1. Execute Accesso eseguito.
2. Execute Serra connessa.
3. Execute Click "Configuration".
4. Execute campi inseriti correttamente (returns "Si").
5. Execute Operazione eseguita.
Expected Result: - Device configuration is updated successfully.

Title: Configure Device with Invalid Input
Preconditions: User has accessed the system and connected to a greenhouse.
Test Data: - Invalid: Water = False, Max Temp = -10.0, Min Temp = 1000.0, Max Soil Hum = -50.0, Min Soil Hum = 1000.0, Max Lum = -1000.0, Min Lum = 10000.0
Test Steps:
1. Execute Accesso eseguito.
2. Execute Serra connessa.
3. Execute Click "Configuration".
4. Execute campi inseriti correttamente (returns "No").
5. Execute valore errato.
6. Loop back to Click "Configuration".
Expected Result: - Device configuration is not updated and user is prompted to re-enter data.

Title: Associate User with Device
Preconditions: User and device exist in the system.
Test Steps: 1. Call associa with valid data.
Expected Result: - Returns true and user is associated with the device.

Title: Associate User with Nonexistent Device
Preconditions: User exists in the system but device does not.
Test Steps: 1. Call associa with invalid data.
Expected Result: - Returns false and user is not associated with the device.

Title: Signal Alert from User
Preconditions: User exists in the system.
Test Data: - Valid: User ID = "u123", Alert Message = "High temperature detected"
Test Steps: 1. Call segnala with valid data.
Expected Result: - Returns true and alert is signaled.

Title: Signal Empty Alert from User
Preconditions: User exists in the system.
Test Steps: 1. Call segnala with invalid data.
Expected Result: - Returns false and alert is not signaled.

Title: Collect Historical Data from User
Preconditions: User exists in the system.
Test Data: - Valid: User ID = "u123", Data = "2023-10-01", Soil Humidity = 30.0, Temperature = 25.0, Luminosity = 500.0
Test Steps: 1. Call raccolge informazioni with valid data.
Expected Result: - Returns true and historical data is collected.

Title: Collect Invalid Historical Data from User
Preconditions: User exists in the system.
Test Data: - Invalid: User ID = "u123", Data = "", Soil Humidity = -100.0, Temperature = 1000.0, Luminosity = -500.0
Test Steps: 1. Call raccolge informazioni with invalid data.
Expected Result: - Returns false and historical data is not collected.

Preconditions:
User and device exist in the system and are associated.
